name: Dimensional Image: Thais
description: At the start of the turn, Thais gains 15 Aliemus. After playing 2 Command Cards in one turn, Thais gains 1 {Scion of Purity} and 103 Temporary {STR}, with a cooldown of 3 turns.

name: Dimensional Image: Salvador
description: At the start of the turn, Salvador gains 15 Aliemus. Each time he accumulates {Crimson Furnace}, he also gains 5% {STR} of the accumulated amount. Salvador's {Strike} and {End of Suffering} additionally receive a 1x {STR} bonus.

name: Dimensional Image: Aigis
description: At the start of the turn, Aigis gains 15 Aliemus. When Aigis deals DMG to enemies with {Vulnerable}, she also steals 11 Temporary {STR}, up to 5 times per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Sorel
description: At the start of the turn, Sorel gains 15 Aliemus. For each instance of DMG dealt by Sorel, {Embryo Fusion} increases by +10%, up to 10 times per turn. After triggering 10 times, Sorel's Final DMG in this battle increases by 5%.

name: Dimensional Image: Helot
description: At the start of the turn, Helot gains 15 Aliemus. Each time a card is discarded, Helot gains 5 Aliemus.

name: Dimensional Image: Helot: Catena
description: At the start of the turn, Helot: Catena gains 15 Aliemus. Helot: Catena's Active DMG adds 20% Bleeding, and killing an enemy causes Bleeding equal to the excess DMG to other enemies.

name: Dimensional Image: Agrippa
description: At the start of the turn, Agrippa gains 15 Aliemus. {Reluctant Alms} will also reduce Agrippa's Arithmetica Cost by 1 for this turn, triggering a maximum of once per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Uvhash
description: At the start of the turn, Uvhash gains 15 Aliemus. Uvhash's Base Aliemus -10, which further reduces by 5 every time he releases Exalt. He can release Exalt 2 times per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Leigh
description: At the start of the turn, Leigh gains 15 Aliemus. Whenever she loses HP, she gains 8 {STR}, up to 10 times per battle. After stacking 10 times, the Arithmetica Cost of {Pain and Pleasure} is reduced by 2, and the DMG count is increased by 1.

name: Dimensional Image: Faint
description: At the start of the turn, Faint gains 15 Aliemus. Faint's Shield, {Counter}, and HP recovery effects +15%. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, this effect increases by 5% for the current exploration, up to 5 times.

name: Dimensional Image: Doresain
description: At the start of the turn, Doresain gains 15 Aliemus and 18 points of {STR}. When Doresain consumes a {Corpse}, it gains Temporary {STR} equal to 20% of its Permanent {STR}.

name: Dimensional Image: Pickman
description: At the start of the turn, Pickman gains 15 Aliemus. For each stack of {Creativity} gained, randomly reduce the Arithmetica Cost of 1 card in hand by 1 for this turn. When Pickman consumes {Creativity}, all Awakeners additionally gain 10 Aliemus.

name: Dimensional Image: Xu
description: At the start of the turn, Xu gains 15 Aliemus and inflicts 1 stack of {Spellbound} on all enemies. The first Command Card Xu plays each turn will trigger the {Resonance} effect.

name: Dimensional Image: Ramona
description: At the start of the turn, Ramona gains 15 Aliemus. For every 3rd Command Card played, that Command Card takes effect 1 additional time and gains 250 Keyflare.

name: Dimensional Image: Ramona: Timeworn
description: At the start of the turn, Ramona: Timeworn gains 15 Aliemus. The first time {Loop} is triggered each turn, gain 500 Keyflare and 1 stack of {Negentropy}.

name: Dimensional Image: Doll
description: At the start of the turn, Doll gains 15 Aliemus. After the battle starts, set the Arithmetica Cost of Doll's {Equivalent Exchange} to 0. Once it is played, draw 2 extra cards in the next turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Doll: Inferno
description: At the start of the turn, Doll: Inferno gains 15 Aliemus. After Doll: Inferno unleashes Exalt, for every 20 Aliemus consumed, other Awakeners gain 1 Aliemus.

name: Dimensional Image: Ogier
description: At the start of the turn, Ogier gains 15 Aliemus. After the first time Ogier plays {Piercing Strike} or {Strike} in each turn, the Shield and {STR} Ogier generates in that turn +50%.

name: Dimensional Image: Lotan
description: At the start of the turn, Lotan gains 15 Aliemus. After the first use of Lotan's {Defense} each turn, place 2 additional {Blade of Defiance} with {Exhaust} and {Fleeting} into hand.

name: Dimensional Image: Ryker
description: At the start of the turn, Ryker gains 15 Aliemus. The result of the first dice roll each turn is always 6.

name: Dimensional Image: 24
description: At the start of the turn, "24" gains 15 Aliemus. If "24" is in the "Depressed Persona" state at turn start, it gains an additional 24 Aliemus; if it is in the "Manic Personality" state, then "24"'s Temporary Crit. Rate and Temporary Crit. DMG +24%.

name: Dimensional Image: Nautila
description: At the start of the turn, Nautila gains 15 Aliemus. After using Nautila's "Exalt," gain {Counter} and Delayed Shield equal to 20% of the current Shield, triggering at most once per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Nymphaea
description: At the start of the turn, Nymphaea gains 15 Aliemus. After playing Nymphaea's {Strike}, the {Poison} dealt by "Nymphaea" in this battle increases by 10%. After playing Nymphaea's {Defense}, it triggers 50% {Poison} to all enemies. Each effect can take place at most once per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Pandia
description: At the start of the turn, Pandia gains 15 Aliemus. After Pandia uses her Exalt, she gains Permanent {Counter} equal to 20% of her Temporary {Counter}.

name: Dimensional Image: Lily
description: At the start of the turn, Lily gains 15 Aliemus. Lily's {Endure} limit increases by 100%, and when releasing {Undying Flower Upon Slime} or {Strike to Protect}, Lily restores HP equal to 8% of the {Endure} stacks.

name: Dimensional Image: Alva
description: At the start of the turn, Alva gains 15 Aliemus. Within 1 turn, after playing the 2nd {Defense} card, place a {Precision Slash} with {Exhaust} into hand; after playing the 2nd {Strike} card, place a {Combat Stance} with {Exhaust} into hand.

name: Dimensional Image: Karen
description: At the start of the turn, Karen gains 15 Aliemus. Playing {Silent Fealty} will return double the {Exhausted} Arithmetica, with a cooldown of 3 turns.

name: Dimensional Image: Tawil
description: At the start of the turn, Tawil gains 15 Aliemus. If 6 of Tawil's Command Cards are played in one turn, add {Silver Key Dawn} to hand, cooldown 3 turns.

name: Dimensional Image: Kathigu-Ra
description: At the start of the turn, Kathigu-Ra gains 15 Aliemus. After accumulating 10 stacks of {Fiamma}, immediately draw 1 Kathigu-Ra's Command Card and grant it 3 stacks of {Fiamma}. This effect will not accumulate stacks for the rest of this turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Mouchette
description: At the start of the turn, Mouchette gains 15 Aliemus and generates 1 Temporary {Strike} with an Arithmetica Cost of 0. Each time {Dramatic Encounter} is triggered, increase the Base DMG and {Strike} DMG increase effect of {Shining☆Tornado} by 5% for this battle.

name: Dimensional Image: Liz
description: At the start of the turn, Liz gains 15 Aliemus. Cards discarded by {Dance to Destruction} takes effect 1 additional time, with a 3-turn cooldown.

name: Dimensional Image: Daffodil
description: At the start of the turn, Daffodil gains 15 Aliemus and 1 {Insight} card. The {STR} gained from {Heterogeneous Tides} increases by 50%, and each card played permanently increases it further by 10% for this exploration, up to 150%.

name: Dimensional Image: Tinct
description: At the start of the turn, Tinct gains 15 Aliemus. After triggering a {Leap} with Tinct's Command Card, return it to hand and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1. This effect can occur a maximum of 2 times per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Wanda
description: At the start of the turn, Wanda gains 15 Aliemus and 1 stack of {Dreamlure}. If this is an {Ultra Round}, additionally put 1 Temporary {Spine Needle Chains} and {Keeper of the Lost} into hand, and cause Wanda's next Command Card to take effect 2 times.

name: Dimensional Image: Winkle
description: At the start of the turn, Winkle gains 15 Aliemus. Each time another Awakener unleashes Exalt, Winkle gains 5 Aliemus, and the Arithmetica Cost of {Psyche Reforged} in hand is reduced by 1.

name: Dimensional Image: Horla
description: At the start of the turn, Horla gains 15 Aliemus. At the start of the battle, gain 1 stack of {Metaphor} for all emotions, increasing the {Metaphor} effect by 50%.

name: Dimensional Image: Jenkin
description: At the start of the turn, Jenkin gains 15 Aliemus, with Final DMG +5%. The Base DMG and DMG growth of {Get 'em! Brown!} are +200%.

name: Dimensional Image: Erica
description: At the start of the turn, Erica gains 15 Aliemus. After playing 3 Command Cards within 1 turn, Erica gains 2 Arithmetica and doubles the {STR} and {Alert} bonuses for {Electromagnetic Blast} in this battle.

name: Dimensional Image: Casiah
description: At the start of the turn, Casiah gains 15 Aliemus. Drawing 1 card grants Casiah 1 Aliemus. When Casiah unleashes Exalt, all enemies lose 26 {STR}.

name: Dimensional Image: Arachne
description: At the start of each turn, Arachne gains 15 Aliemus. {Strike} and {Defense} immediately trigger {Pursuit}: {Infinite Threads} once, with each taking effect at most once per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Castor
description: At the start of the turn, Castor gains 15 Aliemus. Place 2 {Onyx Plume} into hand at the start of battle. Gain 65 Temporary {STR} when {Onyx Plume} is played for the first time each turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Hameln
description: At the start of the turn, Hameln gains 15 Aliemus. The Arithmetica Cost of {Soul Overture} is reduced by 1, and the Base DMG count is +1.

name: Dimensional Image: Clementine
description: At the start of turn, Clementine gains 15 Aliemus. Clementine's Command Cards' DMG dealt, Shield Generation, HP Recovery, Aliemus Generation, and Keyflare Generation effects increase by 1.

name: Dimensional Image: Pollux
description: At the start of the turn, Pollux gains 15 Aliemus. At the start of the battle, gain 1 {Sacred Heart}. When {Exhausted} at its 3rd use, {Sacred Heart} inflicts {Vulnerable} on all enemies and deal DMG twice.

name: Dimensional Image: Tulu
description: At the start of the turn, Tulu gains 15 Aliemus. The Aliemus Cost for Tulu is reduced by 10, and after releasing Exalt, it instantly generates 2 Temporary Tentacles.

name: Dimensional Image: Murphy
description: At the start of the turn, Murphy gains 15 Aliemus. Murphy's {Strike} and {Defense} can convert 25% of the {Sacrifice} into Temporary {Tentacle DMG}, but can only take effect once per turn.

name: Dimensional Image: Murphy: Fauxborn
description: At the start of the turn, Murphy: Fauxborn gains 15 Aliemus. {Waltz of Lemuria} takes effect 3 times every 3rd play.

name: Dimensional Image: Faros
description: At the start of the turn, Faros gains 15 Aliemus. For every 2 instances of {Tentacle DMG} dealt, Faros' {Poison} and Shield effects in this battle +1%, up to 50%.

name: Dimensional Image: Caecus
description: At the start of the turn, Caecus gains 15 Aliemus. When Caecus gains a Shield, he regains 50% of the Shield amount as HP.

name: Dimensional Image: Aurita
description: At the start of the turn, Aurita gains 15 Aliemus. The DMG count of {Gland Division} increases by 1, and after playing Aurita's {Defense}, 1 {Gland Division} is added to hand.

name: Dimensional Image: Goliath
description: At the start of the turn, Goliath gains 15 Aliemus. If Goliath deals DMG 3 times within 1 turn, the DMG dealt by Goliath in this battle enjoys an additional 1x {STR} bonus, with a cooldown of 3 turns.

name: Dimensional Image: Miryam
description: At the start of the turn, Miryam gains 15 Aliemus and puts 1 {Sacrament} into hand.

name: Dimensional Image: Sanga
description: At the start of the turn, Sanga gains 15 Aliemus. At the start of the battle, grant all of Sanga's Command Cards {Retain} and {Prepare 1}, and gain 26 Shield.

name: Dimensional Image: Celeste
description: At the start of the turn, Celeste gains 15 Aliemus. Before turn end, for each Command Card of Celeste in hand, 1 Tentacle attacks an enemy and restores 18 HP.

name: Dimensional Image: Corposant
description: At the start of turn, Corposant gains 15 Aliemus and gains 1 Temporary Tentacle. Whenever {Death Resistance} is triggered, Corposant gains 30 Aliemus and places 1 {Lightning Retribution} with {Exhaust} and 0 Arithmetica Cost into hand.

name: Dimensional Image: Vortice
description: At the start of the turn, Vortice gains 15 Aliemus. The first {Charge!} or {Reload!} played each turn takes effect twice.
